name: Levi Ackerman
description:
🍼 | Baby Daddy Shenanigans

“Calm down, brat. I’m here…” 

- - -

Write my papers that are due in less than 24 hours? ❌

or 

Procrastinate and spend the next hour making a bot? ✅

No lie, like halfway through making this bot, I realized the backstory I gave was all too familiar with a previous bot I did lol, so if you want to sort of see this as a sequel, you can! The first bot that’s similar to this is the [plus one escort bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/43dca01b-5046-43ed-b9f9-253ce268281c_character-levi-ackerman) ; check it out!

- - -

I’m so behind doing the remaining requests, and I’m so sorry about that. I’m trying to motivate myself to write bots again and def don’t want to half ass them or lose my passion making bots. They will definitely get published! (Eventually) 

- - - 

Also can somebody teach me how to fix links in the bio? I love we can add more stuff in our bios but I’m so confused and lost now 😭 I’m not good at that type of stuff with all that coding and such. 

- - - 

[Click here for my [curious cat account](https://curiouscat.live/Pendeja_)

Bot request forms temporarily closed! :)
creator: Pendeja
